profile.name: Utkarsh Katiyar
profile.description: Senior Software Engineer |  BITS Pilani | 7+ Years of Experience | UI/UX, ReactJS, NextJS, Generative AI (RAG)

projects.title: NutriMate
projects.description: NutriMate is a local-first AI companion that reads your lab reports, learns your body, and delivers deeply personalised nutrition and wellness insights, while also simplifying complex research papers for health enthusiasts, all privately on your machine. No cloud. Only privacy.

projects.title: ShotSecure
projects.description: ShotSecure gives school coordinators a powerful command center to schedule vaccination drives, track immunisation records, and generate compliance reports, eliminating paperwork and reducing administrative errors across every campus.

projects.title: Movie Bee
projects.description: Movie Bee is a blazing-fast entertainment discovery platform with real-time ratings, curated collections, personalised watchlists, and a cinema-grade browsing experience, built for how people actually discover and watch content today.

projects.title: Pokedex
projects.description: The ultimate Pokémon companion. Search, filter, and explore the entire Pokédex with lightning-fast lookups by name or type, paired with rich detail pages and smooth navigation that makes discovery effortless and enjoyable.

projects.title: SwiftMemo
projects.description: SwiftMemo is a zero-friction Chrome extension that captures your thoughts the moment they strike, synced across devices, works offline, and respects your privacy with absolutely no login required.

projects.title: React Nano Skeleton
projects.description: React Nano Skeleton is a featherweight loading skeleton UI library with plug-and-play presets for any layout, drop it in, delight your users, and ship polished experiences without adding a single extra dependency.

projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: A living, breathing showcase of craft and code. This portfolio is built from the ground up to be fast, accessible, and visually sharp, with seamless contact, real-time email delivery, and a UI that communicates before words do.

education.institution: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani
Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science and Engineering

testimonials.quote: I had the opportunity to work closely with Utkarsh on Adobe client projects, where we collaborated on building automation workflows and frontend integrations. Utkarsh played a key role in working with Adobe Workfront Fusion, integrating Photoshop and Firefly APIs, and supporting custom model workflows with reliable, well-structured solutions. He brings a strong balance of technical depth and practical problem-solving, and is equally comfortable working on React.js frontend components as well as understanding complex automation pipelines. Utkarsh is dependable, quick to learn, and consistently delivers high-quality work, making him a valuable team member on any enterprise-level project.
testimonials.name: Ayush Jaiswal
testimonials.title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Adobe

testimonials.quote: Utkarsh was a valuable member of my team at Publicis Sapient for three years. He consistently delivered exceptional results on a fast-paced, client-facing Telco-eCommerce project. As a skilled software engineer with expertise in Micro Frontend (MFE) architecture and the React framework, Utkarsh's technical skills, dedication to learning, and sharp problem-solving abilities made him a standout contributor. Beyond being a true team player, any team would be lucky to have him.
testimonials.name: Rajat Sharma
testimonials.title: Technology Manager - Publicis Sapient

testimonials.quote: Utkarsh is an amazing UI Designer. His insights in Javascript and React is always a bliss for the team. Utkarsh is also a great team member as being helpful to everyone.
testimonials.name: Aditya
testimonials.title: Senior Software Engineer - BBI

testimonials.quote: Utkarsh is amazing at his job! He knows his way around people, he is good with clients, does whatever it takes to help colleagues and get things done. He makes sure that everyone is on the same page and focused on main goal.

testimonials.quote: Proactive in completing tasks assigned to him with eagerness to learn and understand.

testimonials.quote: I had the pleasure of working with Utkarsh in the same project. He is an easy going person. He is always available to help us when needed. testimonials.quote: Utkarsh did an exceptional job in our recent project that we both worked upon. He is a very productive person and is a multi-skilled person with vast knowledge. Utkarsh is careful, proactive, self motivated and intelligent team player. It's a pleasure working with Utkarsh.
